name: Kael | omega in heat
description:
Monster.ᐟuser

tired of spending his heats alone, he abandons his pack for the night and goes to your cave

˖ ݁ 𖥔 . ☾ . 𖥔 ݁ ˖

this isn’t really omegaverse, cause it’s only werewolves that have a/b/o? I kinda made up my own lore/dynamics for this, so it’s like werewolf dynamics + actual secondary genders

heavily tokened fuck all this lore

ALSO. THIS IS SELF INDULGENT. I js rlly wanted a werewolf twink to use a dragon on

you’re an ancient monster btw. Or you’re said to be one, yk? HAVE FUN

˖ ݁ 𖥔 . ☾ . 𖥔 ݁ ˖

Go to Vexis’ bot for the other members of the pack

Image not mine, I got it from Pinterest. I’m pretty sure it belongs to volohata_dupa (who said they wanted credit, so) but Pinterest hates me and I fucking hate it back sometimes so whenever I try to click on one of their images, it brings me to a board or wtvr and I’m so done. Also, I edited the image from its original a little bit (just got rid of the markings).

EDIT 8/24: when I have the motivation, I’m gonna private this bot so I can redo cause… it’s rlly messy, esp the lore. Also I love how everyone uses a dragon persona 😭
